parameters.query:
WITH inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO backlink_data (project_name, source_url, target_url, domain_authority, anchor_text, link_type, first_seen, last_seen, status)
  SELECT 
    '{{ $json.project }}',
    link->>'url_from',
    link->>'url_to', 
    COALESCE((link->>'domain_from_rank')::numeric, 0),
    link->>'anchor',
    link->>'dofollow' = 'true' AND 'dofollow' OR 'nofollow',
    CURRENT_DATE,
    CURRENT_DATE,
    'active'
  FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($json.newLinks) }}'::jsonb) AS link
  ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
  RETURNING *
)
SELECT COUNT(*) as new_backlinks FROM inserted;
